title: Peekaboo pricing & founder bios — Peek $100 / Grow $200 / Leads custom
html:
Detailed Peekaboo pricing + team page: agency tier "Peek" $100/mo (2 brands, 20 prompts/brand, daily, 3,600 data points), "Grow" $200/mo (5 brands, 9,000 data points, priority email), "Leads" custom enterprise. Founders john rice (Co-Founder/CTO, SaaS + data engineering) and filipe lins duarte (Co-Founder/CEO, sales + product + digital marketing).

TL;DR

  • peekaboo price ladder (~$100–$200/mo per agency) is roughly the middle tier of Yahir's insight ai sketch — confirms the unit economics he assumed are real.
  • Founders john rice (CTO, data eng) and filipe lins duarte (CEO, sales/marketing) are direct templates of Yahir + diddles's split (backend/scraping vs closing/sales).
  • 20 prompts per brand × daily tracking × 5 brands = 9,000 data points — the LLM-cost shape any insight ai copy of this would have to fund.

peekaboo · john rice · filipe lins duarte · insight ai · aeo agency · competitor research aeo · saas pricing ladders
